title: mentha × muelleriana subsp. stachyoides
intro: Mentha × muelleriana subsp. stachyoides, also known as pineapple mint, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oil content, which has antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of pineapple mint include relief from digestive issues, reduced stress and anxiety, and improved respiratory health due to its expectorant properties. Pineapple mint can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and valuable addition to natural health remedies.
